name: Marit Lage
oracle_text: Flying, indestructible

name: The Monarch
oracle_text:
At the beginning of your end step, draw a card.
Whenever a creature deals combat damage to you, its controller becomes the monarch.

all_parts.name: Starscream, Power Hungry // Starscream, Seeker Leader
all_parts.type_line: Legendary Artifact Creature — Robot // Legendary Artifact — Vehicle

name: Otherworldly Escort
oracle_text:
Flash
When this creature dies, if it's not a Spirit, return it to the battlefield under its owner's control with four charge counters on it. It's a Spirit Detective. (It's no longer a Human.)
{1}{W}, {T}, Remove a charge counter from this creature: Destroy target creature that dealt damage to you this turn.

name: Feather, Radiant Arbiter
oracle_text:
Flying, lifelink
Whenever you cast a noncreature spell that targets only Feather, you may choose any number of other creatures that spell could target and pay {2} for each of those creatures. If you do, for each of those creatures, copy that spell. The copy targets that creature. (Copies of permanent spells become tokens.)

name: Castle Ardenvale
oracle_text:
This land enters tapped unless you control a Plains.
{T}: Add {W}.
{2}{W}{W}, {T}: Create a 1/1 white Human creature token.
flavor_text: Without Ardenvale's loyalty, the realm would greedily devour itself.

name: Solemn Simulacrum
oracle_text:
When this creature enters, you may search your library for a basic land card, put that card onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.
When this creature dies, you may draw a card.

name: Sun Titan
oracle_text:
Vigilance
Whenever this creature enters or attacks, you may return target permanent card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield.
flavor_text: A blazing sun that never sets.

name: Arcane Signet
oracle_text: {T}: Add one mana of any color in your commander's color identity.
flavor_text: It started as a mere drop of water. The Magic Mirror crystallized it into much more.

name: Elspeth, Sun's Champion
oracle_text:
+1: Create three 1/1 white Soldier creature tokens.
−3: Destroy all creatures with power 4 or greater.
−7: You get an emblem with "Creatures you control get +2/+2 and have flying."

name: Orzhov Advokist
oracle_text: At the beginning of your upkeep, each player may put two +1/+1 counters on a creature they control. If a player does, creatures that player controls can't attack you or planeswalkers you control until your next turn.
flavor_text: The Orzhov care not for repentance, only repayment.

name: Faerie Rogue
oracle_text: Flying

name: Insatiable Frugivore
oracle_text:
When this creature enters, create a Food token, then you may exile three cards from your graveyard. If you do, repeat this process.
{3}{B}, Sacrifice X Foods: Creatures you control get +X/+0 and gain menace until end of turn.

name: Chittering Witch
oracle_text:
When this creature enters, create a number of 1/1 black Rat creature tokens equal to the number of opponents you have.
{1}{B}, Sacrifice a creature: Target creature gets -2/-2 until end of turn.

name: Ogre Slumlord
oracle_text:
Whenever another nontoken creature dies, you may create a 1/1 black Rat creature token.
Rats you control have deathtouch.
flavor_text:
"His tenement is filled with the most vile, disgusting vermin. It's infested with rats, too."
—Branko One-Ear

name: Moonstone Eulogist
oracle_text:
Flying
Whenever a creature an opponent controls dies, you create a Blood token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Discard a card, Sacrifice this token: Draw a card.")
Whenever you sacrifice an artifact, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature and you gain 1 life.

name: Maelstrom Pulse
oracle_text: Destroy target nonland permanent and all other permanents with the same name as that permanent.
flavor_text: The storm of mana thundered and crackled with unlimited possibility. It would be beautiful, if it weren't so deadly.

name: Casualties of War
oracle_text:
Choose one or more —
• Destroy target artifact.
• Destroy target creature.
• Destroy target enchantment.
• Destroy target land.
• Destroy target planeswalker.

name: Time Wipe
oracle_text: Return a creature you control to its owner's hand, then destroy all creatures.
flavor_text:
"To comprehend the full answer requires years of temporal study. In short, they were now never born in the first place."
—Teferi

name: Chitterspitter
oracle_text:
At the beginning of your upkeep, you may sacrifice a token. If you do, put an acorn counter on this artifact.
Squirrels you control get +1/+1 for each acorn counter on this artifact.
{G}, {T}: Create a 1/1 green Squirrel creature token.

name: Rootcast Apprenticeship
oracle_text:
Choose three. You may choose the same mode more than once.
• Put two +1/+1 counters on target creature.
• Create a token that's a copy of target token you control.
• Target player creates a 1/1 green Squirrel creature token.
• Target opponent sacrifices a nontoken artifact of their choice.

name: Fellwar Stone
oracle_text: {T}: Add one mana of any color that a land an opponent controls could produce.
flavor_text:
"What do you have that I cannot obtain?"
—Mairsil, the Pretender

name: Arcane Signet
oracle_text: {T}: Add one mana of any color in your commander's color identity.
flavor_text: The dark nights of Valley hold no horrors for batfolk clerics and warriors.

name: Ramunap Excavator
oracle_text: You may play lands from your graveyard.
flavor_text: "This world was once so much more than the confines of Naktamun."

name: Force of Despair
oracle_text:
If it's not your turn, you may exile a black card from your hand rather than pay this spell's mana cost.
Destroy all creatures that entered this turn.
